mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_file ( orgnl_nm, strg_nm, file_path, file_url, mime_type, file_size, upldr_type, created_by ) VALUES ( #{orgnlNm}, #{strgNm}, #{filePath}, #{fileUrl}, #{mimeType}, #{fileSize}, #{upldrType}, #{createdBy} )
mapper.select: SELECT file_idx AS idx, file_uuid AS uuid, orgnl_nm, strg_nm, file_path, file_url, mime_type, file_size, upldr_type, created_by, created_at, del_at FROM tb_file WHERE file_uuid = CAST(#{uuid} AS UUID)
SELECT file_idx AS idx, file_uuid AS uuid, orgnl_nm, strg_nm, file_path, file_url, mime_type, file_size, upldr_type, created_by, created_at, del_at FROM tb_file WHERE file_idx = #{idx}
mapper.update: UPDATE tb_file SET del_at = now() WHERE file_uuid = CAST(#{uuid} AS UUID) AND del_at IS NULL
